• Global EV sales rise 30% in first half of 2026

    Global electric vehicle sales grew by nearly a third in the first half of 2026, industry data shows.

  • China announces new energy vehicle policy for 2026

    The State Council released a policy paper outlining subsidy adjustments and charging infrastructure goals.

  • 新能源汽车 - 维基百科

    新能源汽车是指使用非传统燃料的汽车，包括纯电动汽车和插电式混合动力汽车。
